headline: Computer-use cache for AI agents that run the same workflows every day

site_brief.audience: builders and operators who need repeated computer-use automations to get cheaper and more reliable
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Computer-use cache', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: Computer-use cache
site_brief.use_case_intent: explain Super's computer-use cache as the reusable memory layer for repeated browser and desktop workflows

summary: An indexable use-case page explaining how Super’s computer-use cache lets builders and operators reuse real computer actions across repeated browser and desktop workflows—making them cheaper, more reliable, and easier to operate over time.
